en_title: It’s Finally Happened — You Can Play As Nicolas Cage in Call of Duty
cn_title: 终于来了！《使命召唤》可扮演尼古拉斯·凯奇
subtitle: 绝对电影时刻
opus_summary: 尼古拉斯·凯奇将以干员身份加入《黑色行动7》，6月25日随第四赛季「重装上阵」登场。文章用其著名电影片名编排预告，充满恶搞。同时动视公布《现代战争4》发售日为10月23日。

paragraphs.en: Call of Duty: Black Ops 7 is set to kick off its “Summer of Action” in the only way fitting of the name: by adding Nicolas Cage to the game.
paragraphs.cn: 《使命召唤：黑色行动7》即将以最名副其实的方式拉开「动作之夏」序幕：把尼古拉斯·凯奇加进游戏里。

paragraphs.en: In a Dream Scenario for some, players will now be able to Face/Off with and play as the Hollywood actor, as you pick up 8MM ammunition when you’re feeling Wild at Heart and decide that it’s Time to Kill, proving you’re the Lord of War before using those Longlegs to sprint away from the scene and be Gone in 60 Seconds.
paragraphs.cn: 对某些人来说这堪称《梦想情景》，现在玩家将能与这位好莱坞演员展开《变脸》对决并亲身扮演他，当感到《我心狂野》时捡起《8毫米》弹药，决定《杀戮时刻》已到，证明自己是《战争之王》后，用那双《长腿》飞奔逃离现场，在《极速60秒》内消失无踪。

paragraphs.en: The shooter series has welcomed so many celebrities into its arms over the years that it may feel like Deja Vu, but no, Cage has never appeared in the game before — somewhat surprising for such a National Treasure. OK, that’s enough of that.
paragraphs.cn: 这款射击游戏系列多年来拥抱过众多名人，可能会让人产生既视感，但不对，凯奇此前从未在游戏里出现过——对这么一位《国家宝藏》级演员来说多少有点意外。好了，电影梗到此为止。

paragraphs.en: Season 4 Reloaded sees arguably the biggest action star of the 90s, with films such as Con Air and The Rock being among his most beloved movies, join the fight as an operator. Arriving on June 25, it promises “blockbuster battles” and “absolute chaos”, which is emphasised in the all-action trailer, which ends with Cage walking away from an explosion in slow motion. Absolute cinema.
paragraphs.cn: 第四赛季「重装上阵」迎来这位堪称90年代最大牌的动作明星，其代表作包括《空中监狱》和《勇闯夺命岛》等备受喜爱的影片，他将以干员身份加入战斗。该更新6月25日上线，承诺带来「大片级对抗」和「绝对混乱」，这些在充满动作场面的预告片里得到充分展现，结尾是凯奇慢镜头从爆炸中潇洒离去。绝对电影。

paragraphs.en: It’s fair to say that Black Ops 7 hasn’t been the most well-received Call of Duty, with a sub-standard campaign at launch, followed by some unimpressive multiplayer additions, including a misguided Dave Chapelle tracer pack . But Treyarch hasn’t given up on this year’s release, recently adding a new classic mode that appears to have fixed a lot of issues players have had with the game .
paragraphs.cn: 平心而论，《黑色行动7》并非最受好评的一作《使命召唤》，发售时的战役模式水准欠佳，随后的多人模式更新也不尽如人意，其中包括一个失策的Dave Chapelle曳光弹包。但Treyarch并未放弃今年的作品，最近新增了一个经典模式，似乎修复了玩家遇到的诸多问题。

paragraphs.en: No matter how often the Call of Duty developers insist that each release won’t result in some sort of silliness, it always seems to find its way into the game, but at least this new Nic Cage addition is good fun.
paragraphs.cn: 不管《使命召唤》的开发团队多少次坚称新作不会走向某种胡闹，这种胡闹总会自己钻进游戏里，但至少这次尼古拉斯·凯奇的加入还算有趣。

paragraphs.en: Here’s what players can expect in Season 04 Reloaded:
paragraphs.cn: 以下是玩家可以在第四赛季「重装上阵」中期待的内容：

paragraphs.en: Activision recently revealed 2026’s Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4 . Developed by Infinity Ward, statements have already been made regarding a commitment to keeping “goofy” skins out of the game, claiming that players can “keep the receipts” . We’ll see how well that holds up this time next year.
paragraphs.cn: 动视最近公布了2026年的《使命召唤：现代战争4》。该作由Infinity Ward开发，官方已声明会将「搞笑」皮肤拒之门外，并叫玩家「留着收据」。明年这个时候我们再看看这话能兑现几分。

paragraphs.en: Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4 will release on October 23rd for Xbox Series X|S, PS5, Nintendo Switch 2, and PC. Players can go hands-on with Modern Warfare 4 at Fanatics Fest from July 16th - July 19th.
paragraphs.cn: 《使命召唤：现代战争4》将于10月23日登陆XBOX Series、PS5、任天堂Switch 2和PC。玩家可在7月16日至19日的Fanatics Fest上亲自体验《现代战争4》。
